auth.label: API Token
auth.description: SignPath API token sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Generate it from your personal settings or a CI user account as documented at https://docs.signpath.io/users#interactive-api-token.

extraFields.label: Organization ID
extraFields.description: The SignPath organization ID inserted into every API path. Find it on your organization page, as noted in the official users guide: https://docs.signpath.io/users#support.

actions.name: fast_sign_hash
actions.description: Submit a fast SignPath hash-signing request using the REST API payload.json contract and return the signature result immediately.

projectSlug.description: The project slug to submit the signing request to.

signingPolicySlug.description: The signing policy slug to submit the request to.

signatureAlgorithm.description: The signature algorithm used by the SignPath signing policy.

rsaHashAlgorithm.description: The RSA hash algorithm OID used when the signing policy uses an RSA key.

ecdsaSignatureFormat.description: The ECDSA signature format used when the signing policy uses an ECDSA key.

base64EncodedHash.description: The base64-encoded hash digest that SignPath should sign.

description.description: Optional description to attach to the signing request, such as a version label.

metadata.description: Raw JSON object returned by the SignPath API.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for submitting a fast SignPath hash-signing request.

signingRequestId.description: The signing request identifier created by SignPath.

webLink.description: The SignPath web application link for the signing request.

signature.description: The base64-encoded signature returned by SignPath.

signatureAlgorithm.description: The signature algorithm used by the SignPath signing policy.

rsaHashAlgorithm.description: The RSA hash algorithm OID used when the signing policy uses an RSA key.

base64EncodedHash.description: The base64-encoded hash digest that was signed.

metadata.description: Raw JSON object returned by the SignPath API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized result returned by a fast SignPath hash-signing request.

actions.name: get_signing_request
actions.description: Get the current status and metadata for a SignPath signing request so callers can poll for completion.

signingRequestId.description: The signing request identifier returned by SignPath.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving one SignPath signing request.

isFinalStatus.description: Whether the signing request has reached a terminal status.

workflowStatus.description: The detailed workflow status reported by SignPath.

description.description: The optional description attached to the signing request.

unsignedArtifactLink.description: The SignPath link for downloading the unsigned artifact.

signedArtifactLink.description: The SignPath link for downloading the signed artifact.

origin.description: Raw JSON object returned by the SignPath API.

parameters.description: Raw JSON object returned by the SignPath API.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SignPath signing request result.

actions.name: list_signing_policies
actions.description: List SignPath signing policies visible to the API token, optionally filtered by project and policy slug.

projectSlug.description: Optional project slug to filter returned signing policies.

signingPolicySlug.description: Optional signing policy slug to filter returned signing policies.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for listing SignPath signing policies.

signingPolicyId.description: The unique identifier of the signing policy.

signingPolicySlug.description: The slug of the signing policy.

projectSlug.description: The slug of the project that owns the signing policy.

keyType.description: The key type returned by SignPath, such as Rsa or Ecc.

keySizeInBits.description: The signing key size in bits when available.

publicExponent.description: The base64 public exponent returned by SignPath.

modulus.description: The base64 modulus returned by SignPath.

rsaParameters.description: The RSA public key parameters returned for RSA-backed signing policies.

certificateBytes.description: The base64-encoded X.509 certificate bytes returned by SignPath.

publicKeyBytes.description: The base64-encoded public key bytes returned by SignPath.

items.description: A SignPath signing policy visible to the API token.

signingPolicies.description: The signing policies returned by SignPath.

outputSchema.description: The normalized SignPath signing policy list.
